questions.question: Which loop shape do 2026 terminal coding agents share?
questions.question_zh: 2026 年的终端 coding agent 共享哪种循环结构?

questions.question: Why does the harness run each task inside an E2B or Daytona sandbox?
options: To isolate filesystem and tool execution from the host so the worktree can be torn down on completion
To benchmark token throughput on cold caches
To enable GPU access for the agent loop
questions.question_zh: 为什么 harness 把每个任务跑在 E2B 或 Daytona sandbox 内?
options_zh: 把文件系统和工具执行从宿主机隔离开,让 worktree 在任务结束后可以被销毁
为了绕过模型供应商的速率限制
为了在冷缓存上做 token 吞吐量基准测试
为了让 agent 循环获得 GPU 访问

questions.question: Which built-in hook is the natural place to block destructive shell commands before they execute?
questions.question_zh: 哪个内置 hook 最适合在执行前拦截破坏性 shell 命令?

questions.question: The capstone caps each tool result at roughly 4k tokens. Which failure mode does that primarily prevent?
options: Sandbox escape via malicious shell metacharacters
Context poisoning and runaway cost when a tool returns a large dump
Stale plan state across resumed sessions
questions.question_zh: 本 capstone 把每次工具结果限制在大约 4k token,主要是为了避免哪种失败模式?
options_zh: 通过恶意 shell 元字符逃逸 sandbox
当工具返回大块输出时造成上下文污染和成本失控
在恢复会话时计划状态过期
模型对工具调用轨迹过拟合

questions.question: What does the PreCompact hook do at the 150k-token mark?
options: Cancels the run and refunds the user budget
Summarizes older turns into a prior-state block so the plan and new observations still fit
Force-pushes the current branch to back up progress
Switches the backing model to a smaller draft model
questions.question_zh: PreCompact hook 在 150k token 时做什么?
options_zh: 取消运行并退还用户预算
把更早的轮次摘要为一个 prior-state 块,让计划和新观察仍然能放进上下文
强推当前分支以备份进度
把后端模型切换为更小的 draft 模型

questions.question: Which baseline does the capstone compare its harness against on a 30-issue SWE-bench Pro subset?
questions.question_zh: 本 capstone 在 30 个 SWE-bench Pro 子集 issue 上把 harness 与哪个 baseline 对比?

questions.question: Which metric set is the deliverable measuring against?
questions.question_zh: 交付物对照的是哪一组指标?
